expectations.text: All four requirement IDs (FR-O2C-01 through FR-O2C-04) are present in the output
expectations.evidence: All four IDs appear in the summary table header and in individual detailed analysis sections.

expectations.text: Every requirement row has an explicit fit classification (S/C/X/O)
expectations.evidence: All four requirements have explicit fit classifications: Configuration, Configuration, Customization, Customization.

expectations.text: Every requirement row has both an effort estimate and a risk level
expectations.evidence: Summary table has Effort Estimate and Risk Level columns; detailed sections also include these.

expectations.text: Commission calculation (FR-O2C-04) is classified as Customization
expectations.evidence: FR-O2C-04 classified as Customization with Scheduled Script recommendation.

expectations.text: Output includes a summary or count-by-category section
expectations.evidence: Opens with a Summary Table. Also has Risk Register Summary and Recommended Next Steps.

expectations.text: Each requirement has a Solution ID assigned (e.g. SDD reference, CUST-xx, or similar)
expectations.evidence: No Solution IDs assigned. Document uses narrative descriptions but never assigns formal CUST-XX-NN or SDD §X.X identifiers. RTM cannot be populated from this document.
